title: A high-level, first pass at viewing nuclear insurance as a framework for AI safety
desc: In attempting to identify an industry where insurance/liability made a safety impact and whose framework could be extended to AI safety, I found nuclear to be a somewhat compelling example.

title: My current thesis on for-profit, market-based solutions to AI safety
desc: Why I'm finding insurance, among others, to be a compelling solution. Very open to opinions and feedback
